headline: Elon Musk Once Asked Why Epstein-Maxwell Client List Hasn't Leaked — Here's How He Responded to X User Who Suggested He Was a Client
summary: Elon Musk once took to social media to question the lack of a publicly released client list in the Jeffrey Epstein-Ghislaine Maxwell case.

headline: Elon Musk Sports Black Eye in Oval Office: 'I Was Just Horsing Around With Little X and I Said, Go Ahead, Punch Me in the Face'
summary: During a recent meeting with President Trump, Elon Musk was spotted with a black eye, which Musk said was the result of a playful incident with his son.

headline: Gary Black Questions Tesla's Sky-High Forward P/E Ratio: 'Long-Term Growth Rate Needed To Justify a 180X P/E Would Cause Tsla Market Cap To Be Bigger'
summary: Gary Black, Future Fund LLC's managing director and a prominent market analyst, has expressed concerns about Tesla Inc.'s high forward price-to-earnings (P/E) ratio.

headline: Here's Why Shaquille O'Neal Gave Up Elon Musk's Cybertruck And Passed It To Another NBA Star
summary: Shaquille O'Neal has sold one of his Tesla Cybertrucks to fellow basketball player Trendon Watford.

headline: Ex Says Musk Told Her He Fathered Child With Japanese Pop Star, Said He Would Give Sperm To Anyone Who Wanted It
summary: Elon Musk is alleged to have fathered a child with a Japanese pop star. The news, which surfaced on Friday, also includes Musk's offer to donate his sperm to "anyone."

headline: Trump Says He's 'Not Troubled' By Musk's Alleged Drug Use During Campaign: Report
summary: Trump denies knowing about Musk's alleged drug use during 2024 campaign, says he is unbothered by the claims.

headline: Elon Musk Called AI An 'Existential Risk for Human Civilization' — Yet, He Invested Early In DeepMind After This Warning From Co-Founder Demis Hassabis
summary: Despite previously warning about the dangers of advanced Artificial Intelligence (AI) and robotics, Elon Musk has invested in several AI startups following a stark warning from DeepMind's co-founder.

headline: Ray Dalio Says Investors Are Chasing AI Hype Like It's 1999 And It Could End Just As Badly: Here's What He Recommends
summary: Billionaire investor Ray Dalio warns that today's AI stock boom mirrors the dot-com bubble, urging investors to focus on valuation, risk management, and diversification instead of chasing hype.

headline: ETFs This Week: Markets Whipsaw On Nvidia, Fed, And China—5 Funds That Outperformed
summary: Wall Street saw a rollercoaster of action as markets reacted to geopolitical tensions, earnings, and data. 5 ETFs surged, including KORU and URAA.

headline: Benzinga's 'Stock Whisper' Index: 5 Stocks Investors Secretly Monitor But Don't Talk About Yet
summary: The Benzinga Stock Whisper highlights five stocks seeing increased interest from readers and a look at the potential catalysts driving interest.

headline: Benzinga Bulls And Bears: Nvidia, Palantir, Marvell Technology — And Markets Rallied In May
summary: Benzinga examined the prospects for many investors' favorite stocks over the last week — here's a look at some of our top stories.

headline: Apple Could Join 200MP Camera Club, Matching Samsung's Flagship Specs: Report
summary: A new leak suggests Apple may be working on a 200MP iPhone camera, potentially marking its biggest camera upgrade yet to rival Samsung's offerings.

headline: Trump Demands Automakers, Including Tesla, Build Entirely In The US
summary: President Trump mandates automakers, including Tesla, to manufacture entire vehicles and parts in the US. Tariffs and domestic production emphasized.

headline: Elon Musk's $175 Billion In DOGE Cut Falls Far Short Of The Billionaire's Goal: 'Expect To Achieve Over Time The Trillion Dollars Of Savings,' Says Tesla CEO
summary: Elon Musk ended his controversial DOGE role with praise from Trump, despite DOGE falling far short of its $1 trillion savings goal.

headline: Cathie Wood's Ark Invest Continues To Offload Tesla As Elon Musk Moves On From Trump Administration
summary: Ark Invest made significant trades in TSLA, TXG, NTLA, DDD, and ADPT. Purchase of TXG and NTLA from ARKG and ARKK funds, and sale of TSLA, DDD, and ADPT from various funds.

headline: Elon Musk Lobbies For Support From Lawmakers On Legislation For Self-Driving Cars: Report
summary: Elon Musk lobbies for federal support on autonomous vehicles, while preparing to launch Tesla's Robotaxi service in Austin on June 12.

headline: Google's Monopoly Case Takes A Turn As Judge Considers Lighter Remedies Amid Rising Competition From AI Rivals Like OpenAI And Perplexity
summary: A federal judge signaled he may ease proposed antitrust penalties on Google, citing rapid advances in AI and rising competition from ChatGPT and other next-gen search alternatives.
